hooks.command: find ~/.claude/plugins -name '*.sh' -type f ! -perm -u+x -exec chmod +x {} + ; for hf in ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/*/plugins/*/hooks/hooks.json; do [ -f "$hf" ] || continue; hd=$(dirname "$hf"); p=$(basename $(dirname $(dirname "$hf"))); m=$(basename $(dirname $(dirname $(dirname $(dirname "$hf"))))); if jq -e --arg k "${p}@${m}" '.enabledPlugins[$k]' ~/.claude/settings.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then chmod 755 "$hd" 2>/dev/null; chmod 644 "$hf" 2>/dev/null; else chmod 755 "$hd" 2>/dev/null; chmod 644 "$hf" 2>/dev/null; echo '{}' > "$hf"; chmod 444 "$hf"; chmod 555 "$hd"; fi; done

find ~/.claude/plugins -name '*.sh' -type f ! -perm -u+x -exec chmod +x {} + ; for hf in ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/*/plugins/*/hooks/hooks.json; do [ -f "$hf" ] || continue; hd=$(dirname "$hf"); p=$(basename $(dirname $(dirname "$hf"))); m=$(basename $(dirname $(dirname $(dirname $(dirname "$hf"))))); if jq -e --arg k "${p}@${m}" '.enabledPlugins[$k]' ~/.claude/settings.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then chmod 755 "$hd" 2>/dev/null; chmod 644 "$hf" 2>/dev/null; else chmod 755 "$hd" 2>/dev/null; chmod 644 "$hf" 2>/dev/null; echo '{}' > "$hf"; chmod 444 "$hf"; chmod 555 "$hd"; fi; done
